claim_boundary: H54 certifies only an exact one-sided lower success-probability bound for a pre-registered provider/model direct-audit population, conditional on independent completed attempts, the disclosed sampling schedule, and complete redacted outcome logging. It does not establish platform-wide reliability, exogenous provider selection, truthful reliability reports, correlated-outage risk, or welfare.
required_design: immutable manifest and provider/model/epoch schedule before audit outcomes
later auditor verification of the disclosed random seed against its commitment
requested_provider and selected_provider both equal the pre-assigned provider
all linked direct-attempt outcomes retained, including failures and cancellations
